It just keeps you locked in.QuestionThis is exactly the kind of film that belongs on the big screen.And if you get the chance: IMAX.The film fully delivers on that.QuestionFor me, this is a clear 10/10.Because it works from start to finish and is just a lot of fun.And because you can feel that everything here comes together perfectly.

title: Tribute to the original book
review: As a big fan of the book, I was really afraid that this adaptation would ruin everything that made it so incredible.But it rose to the occasion. What a phenomenal and heartwarming sci-fi movie.I loved the characters, Rocky, the effects, the soundtrack, and even the adapted storyline, considering how hard it is to translate all the scientific depth explored in the book.Even the alteration to Eva's character was welcome, largely thanks to Sandra Hüller's performance (I would never never have imagined Eva singing in the book...).And Ryan Gosling was, after all, the right choice to play Grace.By the end, I was sobbing, even though I had known all along what was going to happen to Rocky and Grace, whose relationship, although short, really felt like a reminder of the original.

title: AMAZE
review: This will go down as one of the best movies of the decade. Was debating on seeing it, no regrets, the movie fully delivers on expectations and exceeds them.The dynamic duo premise working together on such a high stakes mission is unexpected, very well thought out and you're definetely going to enjoy it.It is literally astonishing, will have to read the book now as well.

title: Amaze Amaze Amaze!
review: As good as the book was, I'll admit I was scared about how it would adapt to the screen. But I comfortably say this was an absolute freaking cinema masterpiece! 11/10!Both the book and the movie will forever be remembered as two Crown Jewels of both literature and cinema. Andy Weirs legendary level genius shines through and hits the screen perfectly. Treat yourself and your family!

title: Happy to be alive to see this!
What a great, fun movie! Where had Hollywood been with this?
review: It has been so long since we have been able to have fun at the movies. That is what this movie is, so much fun! It was hilarious first and foremost. I would almost put this in a comedy category for how funny it was. But it was also heartwarming, and thrilling, and exciting, and visually stunning. Ryan Gosling brings the quirky level of comedic charm he has come to be known for. It never got political or preachy one way or another. It is the type of movie you can take your kids to and expect to have a good time and it is one of those movies I cannot wait to own. Might end up seeing it again in theaters.

title: Amaze! Amaze! Amaze! 👎👎👎
review:
Project Hail Mary is one of the best movies I've seen recently!The first question that came to my mind when I left the theater was: will someone who hasn't read the book enjoy the movie as much as someone who has? In my opinion, they will still enjoy it, but not to the same extent.Luckily, I finished reading the book exactly four months ago, so my viewing experience was much richer.I came into the movie wearing two "hats": as a reader who loved the book and is now watching the film, and as a passionate movie fan excited about another sci-fi space film. That's why I'll split this review into two parts.I'll start with the first perspective. I think that because I had read the book and roughly knew what would happen in each scene, I was also more critical of the movie."Why didn't they do it this way?"
"They could have extended this part."
"This short scene is at least 2-3 chapters in the book."
The comparison to the book was always in my head. In a way, it might have "ruined" part of the viewing experience, since I already knew the ending.Despite that, I actually do recommend reading the book first, because it adds much more depth to the characters on screen and takes the time to explain many things that the movie only briefly touches on.Now to the second perspective- the movie lover. Even those who haven't read the book will enjoy the film, although they might miss some details or explanations. Still, they'll understand the overall plot and quickly connect with the main characters.There's no doubt that Ryan Gosling carries the movie. His performance is flawless, and his relationship with Rocky is simply wonderful. In fact, from the moment Rocky appears, the movie becomes much better and just keeps rising without stopping.The film is well-written, smartly directed, visually stunning, and the sound design is simply perfect.I think that because I came in with specific expectations of how each scene should look, it made me, as I mentioned, much more critical. But if you put that aside and look at the movie purely as a sci-fi film, it's truly a masterpiece - funny, emotional, thrilling, and full of heart. It completely absorbed me to the point where I didn't even notice that two and a half hours had passed.What's funny is that because I read the book, the movie actually felt too short! I felt like there was so much more they could have included (though that would have meant a much longer version).In conclusion, if you've read the book, you'll enjoy the movie much more. And if you're not overly critical, you'll enjoy it even more. For those who choose not to read the book - stay focused, but also, you're lucky you haven't yet been exposed to this incredible story by Andy Weir.After much deliberation, I decided to give the film 10 stars - both because it's an excellent adaptation of the book (even if I think some things could have been done differently), and because it's simply a near-perfect sci-fi movie.

title: Hail Mary movie magic still exists!
review: Nothing but praise for this film, this film created so many moments of genuine emotion and awe from start to finish and wow Gosling has shown us that their was no other choice for this role than him, he achieved a perfect balance of heartfelt moments of raw emotion and moments pure joy with a witty remark, who would think so much chemistry could be created a man and a rock. Rocky will cement himself as another timeless lovable fictional character without doubt. The score is fantastic creating perfect tone throughout every situation in the film, The visuals created having not been done with blue screen or green screen are where the magic really strikes how they were done I have no idea and I'm not sure I want to just to keep the magic alive, the film is simply mesmerising, a rollercoaster of a movie and a ride I recommend everyone experiences.

title: Science Fiction Is Back
review: Its so refreshing to not only enjoy a film, but also remember exactly why you first fell in love with the movies. Storytelling and cinema is rarely this good and this engaging.Dr Grace wakes from an induced coma on board a spaceship with zero recollection why he's there. A one way mission of saving Earth from a dying sun ensues, could an unlikely friendship save us all?Its easy to say Ryan Gosling holds this story unbelievably well on his own. It just has to be seen on big screen, visually stunning and cinematography faultless. No lie its an emotional roller-coaster, but its worth every tear and ever laugh.

title: The audiobook is better but the movie is good
review: The movie matches the book pretty good. The book/audiobook is still better if you need to choose. The book is better because you get characters internalization that can't really transfer to a movie. Also the interaction with Rocky as a little lacking in the movie.One thing that bothered me about the movie is it does a poor job showing how Dr. Ryland Grace remembers things over time. The specific time when grace remembers things is an important part of the story but it felt disconnected in the movie. You don't get any of graces internalization as he's getting his memories back and that felt like a big loss.

title: Art
review: I never write reviews but this film gave me the need. It made me feel so many emotions, i cried, i laughed, i just loved everything. I didn't like a film so much since Interestellar.It got everything you wish on a film like this, is pure art.It gave me hope for good films again.THANK YOU!Rocky 🤜🏻

title: What is true friendship?
review: I went to see the movie at the cinema after personally reading the book the film is based on, and also because my girlfriend really wanted to see it - both are very good reasons to watch the movie.Overall, the film is admittedly weaker than the book it's based on, but it is breathtaking and amazing. It made both me and my girlfriend cry at certain moments, and during some scenes we simply said, "Wow."This movie is about the friendship between an alien and an astronaut, and the chemistry between them is incredible. And now about the title - this movie might even turn your friendship with your girlfriend or boyfriend into something truly real. Thank you, movie.

title: The Best Picture & Best Actor Oscar choices for the next Academy Awards show in 2027
review: Ryan Gosling shines and takes us on an epic adventure of a lifetime. Drama, humor, heartstrings all wrapped up into one fantastic film!It will become a classic movie that stands the test of time! The puppetry is seamless and never takes you out of the movie.The ensemble delivers on every level, the perfect cast, they bring it home.

title: What a 20 year old thinks.
review: This movie knows how to do two things, build anticipation and pull at your heartstrings. It's beautiful movie with characters you easily grow attached to and it will make you celebrate and cry with the characters. They have a great story with an ending that makes the story feel complete and it doesn't leave me with more questions than answers.
